timeline.event: M23 Rebel Spokesperson Killed in DR Congo Drone Strike
timeline.description: Willy Ngoma, the military spokesperson for the M23 rebel group, was killed in an army drone strike in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

timeline.event: RSF Attack in Sudan Leaves 28 Dead
timeline.description: An attack by the Rapid Support Forces on the town of Misteriha in North Darfur, Sudan, resulted in at least 28 deaths and 39 injuries.
